sys_script_include.description: Script Include to return an Company name. The calling client-side script passes a sys_id for a User table record.
sys_script_include.name: GetCompanyName

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_include_dc5a9b1247832110eea9ba48436d4334
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>public</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_1052881_module3.GetCompanyName</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>true</client_callable><description>Script Include to return an Company name. The calling client-side script passes a sys_id for a User table record.</description><name>GetCompanyName</name><script><![CDATA[var GetCompany = Class.create();
// Extend the global.AbstractAjaxProcessor class
GetCompany.prototype = Object.extendsObject(global.AbstractAjaxProcessor,{
  // Define the getEmail function.  
  // Create a GlideRecord for the User table.
  // Use the sysparm_userID passed from the client side to retrieve a record from the User table.
  // Return the email address for the requested record
  getCompany: function() {
    var userRecord = new GlideRecord("sys_user");
    userRecord.get(this.getParameter('sysparm_userID'));
    return userRecord.company + '';
  },
  type: 'GetCompany'
});]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2023-05-29 07:10:02</sys_created_on><sys_id>dc5a9b1247832110eea9ba48436d4334</sys_id><sys_mod_count>3</sys_mod_count><sys_name>GetCompanyName</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Module3" source="x_1052881_module3">c9619ea047b2a510eea9ba48436d4318</sys_package><sys_policy>read</sys_policy><sys_scope display_value="Module3">c9619ea047b2a510eea9ba48436d4318</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_dc5a9b1247832110eea9ba48436d4334</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2023-05-29 09:24:49</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>
